name: Launch Point
address: 209 N Rum River Dr, Princeton, MN 55371
about: Launch Point is an indoor golf simulator venue located in Princeton, Minnesota, offering year-round play 24/7. The facility features simulator technology and provides a variety of club options including men's right and left-handed clubs, women's clubs, and junior 50-inch clubs. It caters to golfers looking to practice, compete, or simply have fun at any time of day or night. The venue emphasizes an accessible booking process and has received positive feedback on its setup and overall experience from customers.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access allows for flexible golfing anytime
Variety of club options provided for different player types
Easy booking process enhances the customer experience

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned, BYOB likely allowed
No alcohol service mentioned, BYOB likely allowed

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium simulator hardware mentioned in customer reviews

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, Launch Point provides men's right and left-handed clubs, women's clubs, and junior 50-inch clubs for use.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) is likely allowed as no food or drink service is mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify a time for 18 holes, but an hour booking is mentioned as a popular option.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue provides junior 50-inch clubs and is generally welcoming to families.
